purpose: List, upsert, and delete Fund Types (governmental/NFP fund accounting). Top-level grouping of funds (e.g. Governmental Funds, Proprietary Funds).
id_field_naming_gotcha: Body field `engagementId` carries the clientId (first integer in the engagement URL), NOT the engagementId. Standard workbench-api misnaming - see architecture.md.

fundTypes.id: int (OMIT this key entirely for new entries - FundType does NOT accept id=0 like Fund/FundSubType do)
fundTypes.name: string

response_shape_get.field_name_asymmetry: GET returns prefixed field names; PUT body expects bare names. Use scripts.funds.normalize_fund_types() to convert.

semantics.put_is_whole_list_replace: PUT replaces the entire fundTypes collection - BUT empty-array PUT is a silent no-op (server safety). To actually delete a row, use the DELETE endpoint.
semantics.new_entry_id_convention: Omit the id key. FundType rejects id=0.
semantics.delete_behavior: Single-row DELETE. Returns 200 with empty body. Returns 400 with {messages: ['You cannot delete this fund type while fund(s) or fund subtype(s) remain assigned to it.']} if dependents exist. Server enforces independently of the eligibility GET - that GET is UX-only.
semantics.ui_quirk: CCH UI fires one PUT per 'Add Fund Type' click rather than batching. Programmatic callers can batch in one PUT.

verification: After upsert, GET /v1/FundType/{clientId} and confirm the new row appears with a server-assigned id. After delete, GET and confirm the row is gone.
